message:
fix: skip immediate refetch on dashboard nav when cache has fresh data (#7653)

When navigating between dashboards, each page component remounts and
its useCached* hooks fire immediate refetches that contact all clusters
including unreachable ones (15s timeout each). This caused Cluster Admin
to take 11s+ and Security to take 4.5s+.

Now, if the shared cache already has data fetched within the refresh
interval, the immediate fetch is skipped. The auto-refresh timer
handles background updates. Dashboard and My Clusters were already fast
because they don't call useCached* hooks at the page level.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
